decision-tree.root-question: Is this a Python project on >= 3.11 where mypy --strict is acceptable on at least the public boundary?

branch.question: Is Poetry acceptable as the dep manager (or migration possible)?
Will the team adopt the services/ layer pattern (Django) or service-functions (FastAPI/general)?

example.trace: new Django 5 service, Python 3.12, Poetry accepted -> run-the-checklist
